title: Belyayevo
summary: Belyayevo (Russian: Беляево) is the name of several rural localities in Russia.
text:
Belyayevo (Russian: Беляево) is the name of several rural localities in Russia.

Modern localities
Chelyabinsk Oblast
As of 2014, one rural locality in Chelyabinsk Oblast bears this name:

Belyayevo, Chelyabinsk Oblast, a settlement in Unkurdinsky Selsoviet of Nyazepetrovsky District; 55°54′N 59°19′E

Chuvash Republic
As of 2014, one rural locality in the Chuvash Republic bears this name:

Belyayevo, Chuvash Republic, a village in Aldiarovskoye Rural Settlement of Yantikovsky District; 55°35′N 47°44′E

Ivanovo Oblast
As of 2014, two rural localities in Ivanovo Oblast bear this name:

Belyayevo, Puchezhsky District, Ivanovo Oblast, a village in Puchezhsky District
Belyayevo, Yuryevetsky District, Ivanovo Oblast, a village in Yuryevetsky District

As of 2014, one rural locality in Kaluga Oblast bears this name:

Belyayevo, Kaluga Oblast, a village in Yukhnovsky District

As of 2014, one rural locality in Kirov Oblast bears this name:

Belyayevo, Kirov Oblast, a selo in Potnyakovsky Rural Okrug of Kiknursky District; 57°22′N 47°25′E

As of 2014, one rural locality in Kursk Oblast bears this name:

Belyayevo, Kursk Oblast, a selo in Belyayevsky Selsoviet of Konyshyovsky District

Belyayevo, Studensky Selsoviet, Usmansky District, Lipetsk Oblast, a selo in Studensky Selsoviet of Usmansky District; 51°58′N 39°41′E

Belyayevo, Chekhovsky District, Moscow Oblast, a village in Stremilovskoye Rural Settlement of Chekhovsky District; 55°09′N 37°20′E

Belyayevo, Fedurinsky Selsoviet, Gorodetsky District, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast, a village in Fedurinsky Selsoviet of Gorodetsky District; 56°49′N 43°26′E
Belyayevo, Smirkinsky Selsoviet, Gorodetsky District, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast, a village in Smirkinsky Selsoviet of Gorodetsky District; 56°54′N 43°32′E
Belyayevo, Koverninsky District, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast, a village in Gavrilovsky Selsoviet of Koverninsky District; 57°06′N 43°39′E
Belyayevo, Sokolsky District, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast, a village in Loyminsky Selsoviet of Sokolsky District; 56°58′N 43°26′E

As of 2014, one rural locality in Pskov Oblast bears this name:

Belyayevo, alternative name of Belyayeva, a village in Boshinsky Rural Administrative Okrug of Karachevsky District in Bryansk Oblast; 53°01′N 34°55′E
Belyayevo, alternative name of Bebyayevo, a village in Bebyayevsky Selsoviet of Arzamassky District in Nizhny Novgorod Oblast; 55°19′N 43°56′E
